title: peplis nummulariifolia subsp. borysthenica
intro: Peplis nummulariifolia subsp. borysthenica, also known as Borysthenica pepli, is a subspecies of the Peplis nummulariifolia plant, belonging to the family Tropaeolaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Peplis nummulariifolia subsp. borysthenica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its leaves in water, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
